## How it was tested

<!-- e.g. pnpm run build, pnpm run build:web, npx expo export, two-instance P2P smoke -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are **signed off** (`git commit -s`) per the DCO (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `pnpm run build` succeeds (and `pnpm run build:web` if the renderer changed)
- [ ] For mobile changes, `npx expo export` compiles cleanly
- [ ] Lints pass and the code matches the surrounding style
- [ ] Docs / comments updated if behavior or public surface changed
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, build artifacts, or large binaries committed
